text: Standing here, surrounded by displays of technology and images of people interacting with machines, I feel a blend of curiosity and contemplation. The juxtaposition of robotic pets, transcripts, and human faces makes me reflect on the evolving relationship between humanity and artificial intelligence. The presence of others, each lost in their own thoughts, adds a sense of shared wonder to the experience. I feel small in the face of these advancements, yet also inspired to ponder what it means to be intelligent—or alive.
